overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character exploring a foggy, overcast boatyard during autumn. The character navigates through a cluttered maritime storage area with boats on jack stands, corrugated metal sheds, and fallen leaves covering the gravel ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between metal shed and rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a narrow path between a corrugated metal building and a rock wall

entered.detail: gray metal building with vertical ridges running along the left side of the path
large gray boulder formation covered with moss on the right side
thick green shrubbery growing around the rock wall
red A-frame ladder visible in the distance against the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a tight, shadowy corridor between an industrial metal shed and a mossy rock wall. Dense vegetation lines the right side while the building creates a sheltered, enclosed feeling with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open boatyard storage area with vessels on stands

events.description: exits narrow alley into open boatyard with first fishing boat visible on jack stands

agents.ego_description: emerging from the narrow path and walking into the open yard, surveying the boats and buildings

entered.detail: small fishing vessel elevated on wooden stands with outboard motor
large round satellite dish mounted on a pole near the workshop
low industrial building with corrugated metal walls and flat roof
American flag hanging from a pole on the metal shed

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a foggy boatyard where a fishing boat sits on stands in the center. The character walks past industrial buildings while an American flag becomes visible on the left, and the ground transitions from grass to gravel covered with fallen autumn leaves.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered boatyard with multiple vessels and maintenance equipment

events.description: passing under a large tree with prominent red autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered yard, moving between boats and equipment while heading toward larger vessels

entered.detail: tall tree with distinctive red and orange autumn leaves providing partial canopy
larger boat with cabin and mast on wooden stands, weathered gray paint
wooden A-frame ladder leaning against the large fishing vessel
white and blue buckets scattered near the boat stands

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the boatyard, passing under a striking red-leaved tree. Larger fishing vessels dominate the right side, elevated on stands with maintenance equipment scattered around. The fog thickens slightly as the character navigates between the stored boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of boatyard transitioning to wooded area

events.description: approaching an abandoned car at the edge of the boatyard near the tree line

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the yard where the boat storage meets the forest edge, approaching a derelict vehicle

entered.detail: derelict dark-colored sedan parked among the trees at the yard's edge
boat covered with a gray tarp on stands
dense evergreen trees forming the backdrop beyond the boatyard

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back of the boatyard where the industrial area gives way to forest. An abandoned car sits among the trees ahead while the path becomes more overgrown. The large fishing vessel recedes to the left as the character approaches the tree line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into an expansive, foggy boatyard that eventually merges with a wild forest. It begins by navigating a tight, shadowy passage between a metal shed and a mossy rock wall, where dense vegetation creates a sense of enclosure. As the path opens, the camera emerges into a misty yard where the ground shifts from grass to leaf-strewn gravel, passing an American flag and a fishing boat perched on stands. The scene then deepens as the character moves under a vibrant red-leaved tree and weaves between larger elevated vessels and scattered maintenance equipment. Finally, the industrial structures recede to the left as the path becomes overgrown, leading the camera toward an abandoned car nestled within the encroaching tree line.
